name: User Cards
description: Lightweight per-speaker user cards injected from channel envelopes

databasePath.description: Plugin-relative SQLite database path used as the source of truth.

autoLearn.description: Capture small preference/project notes from inbound messages.

inject.description: Inject the current speaker card during prompt build.

maxCardChars.description: Maximum injected card size in characters.

maxRosterNames.description: Maximum same-channel visible names injected as a lightweight roster.

maxRecallEvents.description: Maximum matching event packets injected for direct memory queries.

includeDisplayName.description: Include channel-visible display names in injected cards.

privateAliases.description: Names or aliases that may be stored locally but must never be injected.

passiveDiscordLogTail.description: Local debug-log tailer that hydrates Discord message authors before mention-gated drops.

passiveDiscordGateway.description: Local Discord gateway tap that captures author id/display name without turning passive chatter into agent turns.

captureMessages.description: Store sanitized recent message snippets from the passive tap. Requires Discord Message Content intent for most guild messages.

captureGuildMembers.description: Request Discord's privileged guild-member intent and store member-list identity packets when available.

maxCapturedMessages.description: Maximum passive message snippets retained per speaker card.

maxMessageChars.description: Maximum characters retained per passive message snippet.

passiveIMessageWatch.description: Local read-only imsg watch tap that captures iMessage/SMS speakers without turning passive chatter into agent turns.

captureMessages.description: Store sanitized recent message snippets from imsg watch --json.

includeSelfMessages.description: Capture messages marked is_from_me by imsg. Disabled by default.

maxCapturedMessages.description: Maximum passive iMessage snippets retained per speaker card.

maxMessageChars.description: Maximum characters retained per passive iMessage snippet.

llmSummarization.description: Optional local Ollama fallback summarizer that converts messages into bounded event-note packets.

endpoint.description: Ollama-compatible endpoint used only for user-card note extraction.

numCtx.description: Optional Ollama options.num_ctx override for the fallback summarizer. Leave unset so this background path does not resize the active chat model.

keepAlive.description: Optional Ollama keep_alive override for the fallback summarizer. Leave unset, or set false to omit keep_alive.

daemonSummarization.description: Optional LibraVDB daemon summarizer used before the LLM fallback for background note extraction.

libravdbProjection.description: Optional async projection of passive captured messages into LibraVDB memory.

tenantKey.description: LibraVDB tenant/user key to project passive captured messages into.

pushCapturedMessages.description: Project passive captured messages that were not addressed to the OpenClaw agent.
